evidence.summary: Repaired operator README with local run, daily report, Windows runbook, environment boundary, and safety instructions.
Repaired .env.example with crawler/Qianniu local defaults, Feishu table keys, Chinese display names, pending replay path, and daily report time.
Local Feishu double contains one daily_report row after two sends for unique_key taobao_shop_001_20260602, proving upsert prevents duplicates locally.
No live Qianniu CDP response and no Feishu credentials/table IDs were present in this Codex surface.

blockers.detail: FEISHU_APP_ID, FEISHU_APP_SECRET, FEISHU_APP_TOKEN, FEISHU_TABLE_DAILY_REPORT, and FEISHU_TABLE_TASK_LOG were not available in the environment, so real Feishu Bitable daily report upsert/readback could not be attempted.
http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version was unavailable from this surface, so no live logged-in Qianniu PC session evidence could be collected.
